# remnawave_system_stats (Data Source)

Returns system statistics from the Remnawave panel.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `tz` (String) Timezone for the stats (e.g. 'Europe/Berlin'). If omitted, the server default is used.

### Read-Only

- `cpu_cores` (Number)
- `memory_free` (Number)
- `memory_total` (Number)
- `memory_used` (Number)
- `nodes_total_bytes_lifetime` (String)
- `nodes_total_online` (Number)
- `online_last_day` (Number)
- `online_last_week` (Number)
- `online_never` (Number)
- `online_now` (Number)
- `timestamp` (Number)
- `uptime` (Number)
- `users_status_counts` (Map of Number)
- `users_total` (Number)
